_meta.purpose: Post-demo reviewer feedback (May 2026): the matching score must reflect that H-FARM is an applied / hands-on partner — not a peer for top research universities, and not a partnership target for Italian competitors. This file lists the entities where we surface a visible fit warning + apply a score penalty, plus the keywords that signal a high-fit applied partner.
_meta.notes: Patterns match against the entity name (case-insensitive substring). Each warning is additionally gated by entity_type so a competitor pattern (e.g. 'Bocconi') doesn't false-positive on a student org named after the competitor university ('ESN Milano Bocconi'). Manual 'Hot' / 'Critical' / 'Up & Running' priority always overrides the candidate hide. Keep the list tight — false positives are worse than false negatives.
